nodes.name: cli.py
nodes.summary: Typer CLI entry point ('sdd-pipeline') wiring every command — index, convert, export, lint, scan, scan-taxonomy, search, tui, and check — to the pipeline and converter layers.
nodes.languageNotes: Single large command surface; each command is a thin handler delegating to SemanticPipeline / convert internals.

nodes.name: index
nodes.summary: CLI command that indexes a file or directory into the vector store, wiring embedder/backend selection, optional cross-corpus vocabulary scan, and provenance recording.

nodes.name: convert
nodes.summary: CLI command batching the HTML to GitLab-Markdown converter over docs/**/*.html, applying the confidence/quarantine gate and emitting a per-file plus aggregate JSON report.

nodes.name: export
nodes.summary: CLI command exporting each file's SemanticChunks to per-file .chunks.json/.jsonl artifacts plus an export-report, model-free, with merge-prose/merge-definitions options.

nodes.name: lint
nodes.summary: CLI command running the report-only raw-markdown linter (check_markdown) over a corpus directory and writing a quality-report.json without rewriting any files.

nodes.name: scan
nodes.summary: CLI command running only the cross-corpus discovery half — parse all docs, scan_corpus, persist the entity vocabulary JSON for review before an index run.

nodes.name: scan_taxonomy
nodes.summary: CLI command that scans a corpus to surface section-type/taxonomy distribution for inspection and tuning.

nodes.name: search
nodes.summary: CLI command querying the vector store with optional section-type/space filters and hybrid (dense+BM25/RRF) retrieval, verifying index provenance before searching.

nodes.name: tui
nodes.summary: CLI command launching the interactive Textual search TUI, importing the optional textual dependency only when invoked.

nodes.name: check
nodes.summary: CLI command reporting environment readiness — pandoc, optional deps (chromadb, openai), and whether Azure env vars are set.

nodes.name: show_help
nodes.summary: Renders the rich custom help/overview text for the CLI.

nodes.name: confluence_pf_filter.py
nodes.summary: Stage-C in-process panflute filter for the HTML->Markdown converter: rewrites admonitions, expands, lozenges, layouts, and unconditionally simplifies tables (pipe-escaping, line-break handling) on the pandoc AST.
nodes.languageNotes: Operates on panflute element trees via a dispatch function; pure transformation with notes side-channel.

nodes.name: run_confluence_filter
nodes.summary: Entry helper that applies the Confluence panflute filter over a parsed document, returning the transformed AST.

nodes.name: _dispatch
nodes.summary: Per-element dispatcher routing each panflute node to the matching handler (admonition, expand, lozenge, codelang, table-simplify, etc.).

nodes.name: _table_simplify
nodes.summary:
Unconditionally flattens and simplifies tables — pads rows, folds tiered intermediate header rows, escapes pipes in code cells, and converts cell line breaks to
.

nodes.name: _flatten_cell
nodes.summary: Flattens a table cell's block content (including lists) into a single inline run suitable for a GFM pipe cell.

nodes.name: retrieval.py
nodes.summary: Stage-7c lexical retrieval: a pure-Python BM25 index plus reciprocal rank fusion, complementing dense vector search with a deterministic sparse keyword signal.
nodes.languageNotes: Dependency-free (math/re/Counter only) to keep the lexical scorer deterministic and installable everywhere.

nodes.name: BM25Index
nodes.summary: In-memory BM25 lexical index over tokenized corpus documents, scoring a query against stored term frequencies and document lengths.

nodes.name: reciprocal_rank_fusion
nodes.summary: Fuses two (or more) ranked id-lists via Reciprocal Rank Fusion, robust to scorers on different scales.

nodes.name: convert-docs.ps1
nodes.summary: PowerShell helper running the four-step 'just convert documents' Flow B against the project venv: check, convert HTML to Markdown, review the report, and lint the output (pandoc-only, no model).

nodes.name: ctx.py
nodes.summary: Standalone tooling script that estimates token/context usage across documents and renders an ASCII chart and manifest panel for inspecting corpus size.

nodes.name: analyze
nodes.summary: Analyzes a collected document set, computing per-item token estimates and structural labels.

nodes.name: chart_lines
nodes.summary: Builds the ASCII bar-chart lines visualizing relative document sizes.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Script entry point: parses args, collects and analyzes documents, and prints the chart + manifest panel.

nodes.name: eval_retrieval.py
nodes.summary: Offline retrieval-quality harness: builds a model-free hashing-embedder index over a corpus and scores labelled queries with recall@k and reciprocal rank, emitting a report and append-only log.

nodes.name: HashingEmbedder
nodes.summary: Deterministic model-free embedder (feature hashing) used so the retrieval eval runs without downloading an ML model.

nodes.name: run_eval
nodes.summary: Runs the full evaluation: scores each labelled query against the index and aggregates recall@k and MRR metrics.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Script entry point: loads queries, builds the index, runs the eval, prints the report, and appends to the eval log.

nodes.name: fetch_e2e_corpus.py
nodes.summary: Utility script that downloads the end-to-end test corpus files used by slow/integration tests.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Script entry point that fetches each corpus file into the local fixtures directory.

nodes.name: otelmeter.py
nodes.summary: Self-contained OpenTelemetry metrics/traces inspector: parses OTLP protobuf and JSON exports, ingests sessions/spans/model usage, estimates cost, and renders ASCII model and trace views; can also run as a tiny collector handler.
nodes.languageNotes: Hand-rolled varint/protobuf decoding (no protobuf dependency) so it can read OTLP exports standalone.

nodes.name: inspect_file
nodes.summary: Inspects a single OTEL export file, dispatching to protobuf or JSON extraction and recording sessions, traces, and model usage.

nodes.name: render_tree
nodes.summary: Renders an ASCII tree view of traces/spans with timing and cost annotations.

nodes.name: make_handler
nodes.summary: Builds an HTTP request handler that ingests pushed OTLP payloads, letting the script act as a minimal local OTEL collector.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Script entry point: parses args, either serves the collector or inspects files, ingests data, and renders model/trace reports with cost estimates.

nodes.name: setup-second-brain.ps1
nodes.summary: PowerShell bootstrap script that creates a 'second brain' folder structure and copies template files into a project root.

nodes.name: Create-Dir
nodes.summary: Creates a directory if it does not already exist.

nodes.name: Create-File
nodes.summary: Writes a file with the given content, used to seed template files into the scaffolded structure.
